DASHBOARD.TITLE: Project Catalog

FILTERS.NO_RESULTS_TEXT: Change the search, category, or tags to show projects again.
FILTERS.TITLE: Catalog filters

TIC_TAC_TOE.TITLE: Tic Tac Toe
TIC_TAC_TOE.SUMMARY: Classic grid game prepared as the first Angular migration target.

CALCULATOR.TITLE: Calculator
CALCULATOR.SUMMARY: Utility app for forms, keyboard events, validation, and clean component state.

HANG_MAN.TITLE: Hang Man
HANG_MAN.SUMMARY: Word game candidate for animations, reactive state, and multilingual labels.

WEATHER.TITLE: Weather App
WEATHER.SUMMARY: API-driven project shell for cards, filters, loading states, and error handling.

MUSIC_EVENT.TITLE: Music Event App
MUSIC_EVENT.SUMMARY: Event listing concept for modals, multi-select filters, and detailed list views.

TIC_TAC_TOE.DESCRIPTION: A compact two-player grid game rebuilt as a standalone Angular component with signal-based state.

FEATURES.RESET: The board can be reset instantly after a win or a draw.
FEATURES.TURNS: Players alternate local turns between X and O.
FEATURES.WINNER: Rows, columns, diagonals, and draw states are detected automatically.

TIC_TAC_TOE.TITLE: Interactive Tic Tac Toe

CALCULATOR.DESCRIPTION: A focused calculator project built as a standalone Angular component with keyboard support and safe arithmetic state.

FEATURES.ARITHMETIC: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, decimals, percent, and sign toggle.
FEATURES.ERRORS: Division by zero is handled with a visible error state.
FEATURES.KEYBOARD: Keyboard shortcuts work for digits, operators, Enter, Escape, decimal, and percent.

CALCULATOR.TITLE: Interactive Calculator

HANG_MAN.DESCRIPTION: A focused word-guessing game rebuilt with Angular signals, keyboard input, and clear win/loss state.

FEATURES.KEYBOARD: Letters can be selected on screen or from the physical keyboard.
FEATURES.RESET: A new round clears guesses and loads the next word.
FEATURES.STATE: Correct letters, wrong letters, remaining attempts, and game result are derived from component state.

HANG_MAN.TITLE: Interactive Hang Man

WEATHER.DESCRIPTION: An API-style weather dashboard with simulated loading, filters, summaries, and fallback states.
WEATHER.EMPTY_TEXT: Select another weather condition to show city cards.
WEATHER.ERROR_TEXT: The simulated API request failed. Retry to reload the local forecast data.

FEATURES.ERRORS: Error and retry states are visible without needing a real API failure.
FEATURES.FILTERS: Condition filters and summaries update from the loaded data.
FEATURES.LOADING: A simulated fetch shows loading skeletons before cards render.

WEATHER.TITLE: Weather Dashboard

MUSIC_EVENT.DESCRIPTION: A compact event catalog with PrimeNG tag filters, detailed list rows, summaries, and modal event details.
MUSIC_EVENT.EMPTY_TEXT: Change the category or selected tags to show events again.

FEATURES.EMPTY: The list includes an empty state and reset path for narrow filter results.
FEATURES.FILTERS: Category and tag filters update the event list and summary metrics.
FEATURES.MODAL: Each event opens in a PrimeNG dialog with the key details.

MUSIC_EVENT.TITLE: Music Event Catalog

PROJECT.PLACEHOLDER: The real Angular component for this project will live here.
